title: Moving machine parts
standardIntent: Protect miners from contact with moving machine parts by requiring guarding where moving parts may cause injury.
evidenceNeeded: Photograph moving machine part, guard condition, access path, and surrounding work area.
Document whether miners can contact the moving part during travel, work, inspection, cleanup, or maintenance.
Identify equipment type and machine part involved.
Document whether the equipment was operating, stopped, de-energized, locked/tagged, or otherwise controlled.
Evaluate whether related MSHA standards may apply for cleanup, maintenance, guarding, or conveyor safety.
nonApplicabilityQuestions: Is this location under MSHA jurisdiction?
Can a miner reasonably contact the moving part?
Is the moving part already guarded by location, barrier, enclosure, or other effective guarding?
Is the issue actually a maintenance/energy-control condition rather than normal guarding?
